description_long: This is a group of single-story bungalows arranged on a rectangular grassy plot, featuring multiple detached structures with pitched, shingled roofs. The main building is centrally located and includes a covered porch and a visible swimming pool adjacent to it. The roofs are light brown and appear to be made of wood or composite shingles, while the walls are darker, likely wooden or timber-clad. The layout includes several smaller outbuildings, possibly garages or sheds, and the open green space is well-maintained. The windows and doors are symmetrically placed, and the overall design is reminiscent of a Craftsman or Ranch style. The property is designed for residential use, with ample outdoor space and clear separation between the main house and auxiliary structures.
description: A group of single-story bungalows with pitched shingle roofs, wooden walls, a central porch, and a swimming pool, arranged on a grassy rectangular plot with several detached outbuildings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main bungalow with a covered porch, swimming pool, and two detached outbuildings in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the linear arrangement of the main house, pool, and outbuildings, with the main entrance and porch visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back sides of the bungalows and the spatial relationship between the main house and smaller structures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main house, pool, and all outbuildings, with the porch and pool more visible from this angle.
